title: Locksmith Gainesville FL | Be Secure Locksmith | Mobile & Local
description: Be Secure Locksmith is Gainesville's highest-rated local locksmith — 4.9 stars, 1,300+ reviews. Licensed, insured, and mobile. Serving all of Alachua County. Call 352-290-7035.
heroSubhead: Fast, licensed mobile locksmith service for homes, cars, and businesses across Gainesville, FL.
intro: Be Secure Locksmith delivers reliable, professional locksmith services throughout Gainesville, FL. Whether you’re dealing with a lockout, need new locks installed, or want to rekey your entire property, our mobile team is ready to help. We serve local homes, businesses, and drivers with fast response times, transparent pricing, and dependable results.

Our experienced technicians are fully licensed and trained to handle a wide range of lock and key needs. From residential entry doors to commercial keypad locks, we bring the tools and knowledge needed to do the job right. If you’re in the Gainesville area and need a locksmith you can trust, we’re ready to assist.
Residential Locksmith Services

Home security is essential. We help Gainesville residents protect their property with effective, affordable locksmith solutions. Whether you’ve just moved into a new home or you’re upgrading your current locks, we offer lock installation, lock rekeying, and lockout assistance that keeps your household safe and secure.

Our team installs high-quality locks on front doors, back doors, windows, and sliding glass doors. If you’ve lost your keys or someone else may have a copy, we can rekey your existing locks so old keys no longer work. We also offer key duplication if you want a spare set for family members or emergencies. If you ever get locked out, we provide fast, damage-free entry back into your home.
Commercial Locksmith Services in Gainesville, FL

We work closely with local businesses throughout Gainesville to strengthen their physical lock security. From independent offices to retail stores and large commercial spaces, we offer solutions that help business owners protect assets and limit entry to trusted personnel.

Our locksmiths install and maintain commercial-grade door locks, high-security cylinders, and master key systems. We also set up electronic keypads and keyless entry devices for businesses looking to reduce key circulation. If you’re dealing with a broken lock or employee turnover, we can rekey your doors quickly to ensure access remains restricted. For office lockouts, we provide efficient service that gets your business up and running again with minimal interruption.
Gainesville Automotive Locksmith Services

Locked out of your car? Need a replacement key fob or transponder key programmed? Our mobile automotive locksmiths serve Gainesville drivers with fast, on-site service. We help with lost keys, damaged ignitions, and electronic key issues—no tow truck needed.

Whether you’re near the University of Florida, heading down Archer Road, or stuck outside your home in Haile Plantation, we come to your location equipped with everything needed to get you back on the road. We replace traditional car keys, program modern fobs, and repair ignition lock cylinders for a wide range of domestic and foreign vehicles.
Emergency Locksmith Services

Lock and key problems can happen without warning. That’s why we provide fast, professional emergency locksmith services across Gainesville. Whether you’re locked out of your home late at night, can’t get into your car at the grocery store, or need to secure your business after a break-in, we’re ready to assist.
Our mobile service units are fully stocked with the tools and hardware to handle most lockouts, rekeys, and lock changes on the spot. When you need help fast, Be Secure Locksmith is one call away.
Serving Gainesville and Nearby Communities

Be Secure Locksmith proudly serves Gainesville, FL, and the surrounding area, including Haile Plantation, Newberry, Archer, and High Springs. Whether you’re near downtown, the University of Florida campus, or out by the Florida Museum of Natural History, we provide local, mobile locksmith service that comes to you.
Be Secure Locksmith is Your Gainesville Locksmith Expert

Be Secure Locksmith delivers high-quality, professional locksmith services to homes, businesses, and drivers throughout Gainesville, FL. Our licensed and insured technicians are trained to handle residential, commercial, and automotive locksmith needs with precision, speed, and integrity. We arrive equipped with the right tools to solve the issue—whether you’re upgrading door locks, replacing car keys, or securing your business with a new battery operated smart lock access system.

Our team values customer satisfaction, honest pricing, and dependable results. We don’t upsell or overcharge—just fast, effective service from people you can trust. Call now at 352-290-7035 or request a free quote online to schedule your service. Let Be Secure Locksmith handle all your locksmith needs in Gainesville with care and professionalism.

faqs.question: What areas does your Gainesville locksmith service cover?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Gainesville, FL, and nearby areas like High Springs, Archer, and Newberry. Our mobile locksmith team travels to homes, businesses, and vehicles throughout the region to provide reliable service when and where it’s needed.

faqs.question: What types of locksmith services do you provide in Gainesville?
faqs.answer: Our professional locksmith services include residential locksmith services, commercial locksmith work, and automotive locksmith support. Whether you need lock repair, lock installation, key duplication, or car key replacement, we have the tools and expertise to help.

faqs.question: Do you offer car key programming and key fob replacement?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer car key programming, key fob replacement, and key duplication for most makes and models. Our skilled technicians can cut and program keys for domestic and foreign vehicles, and we complete most jobs on-site with our fully stocked mobile service units.

faqs.question: Can you rekey my locks after a move or security breach?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Lock rekeying is a secure and cost-effective way to ensure old keys no longer work. We recommend rekeying after moving, a break-in, or if a set of keys has been lost. Our team provides this essential service quickly and efficiently to keep your Gainesville property secure.

faqs.question: How can electronic security help my business in Gainesville?
faqs.answer: Modern smart locks and keypad locks provide electronic access systems giving business owners greater control over who enters their building. We install and maintain keypad locks, master key systems, and other commercial solutions to help protect your doors, inventory, and team members with professional service and advanced technology.

faqs.question: What makes Be Secure Locksmith different from other locksmiths in Gainesville, FL?
faqs.answer: We’re known for our friendly service, competitive rates, and high-quality workmanship. Our locksmith Gainesville team is fully licensed, highly experienced, and dedicated to customer satisfaction. Whether you need help at home, work, or on the road, we’re committed to handling all your locksmith needs with care and professionalism.

faqs.question: How quickly can a locksmith arrive at my location in Gainesville?
faqs.answer: Because we operate as a mobile locksmith service, we’re able to respond quickly throughout Gainesville and surrounding areas. Whether you’re locked out, need a lock repaired, or require a car key replacement, our team arrives with all the tools necessary to get the job done fast and right the first time.
